questionText: Show annual revenue, total cost, gross profit, gross margin percentage, and total order lines by fiscal year. Return columns: Fiscal Year, total_revenue, total_cost, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct, total_order_lines. Sort by Fiscal Year ascending.
questionLabel: [Q1][medium] Show annual revenue, total cost, gross profit, gross margin percentage, and total order lines by fiscal year. Return columns: Fiscal Year, total_revenue, total_cost, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct, total_order_lines. Sort by Fiscal Year ascending.

payload.text: SELECT FiscalYear."Fiscal Year" AS FiscalYear, SUM(Sales."Sales Amount") AS total_revenue, SUM(Sales."Total Product Cost") AS total_cost, SUM(Sales."Sales Amount") - SUM(Sales."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit, (SUM(Sales."Sales Amount") - SUM(Sales."Total Product Cost")) / SUM(Sales."Sales Amount") * 100 AS gross_margin_pct, COUNT(Sales."SalesOrderLineKey") AS total_order_lines FROM "Date" AS JOIN "Sales" ON "Date"."DateKey" = "Sales"."OrderDateKey" GROUP BY FiscalYear."Fiscal Year" ORDER BY FiscalYear."Fiscal Year" ASC

payload.text: SELECT p."Category", SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "revenue", SUM(s."Sales Amount") * 100.0 / SUM(SUM(s."Sales Amount")) OVER () AS "revenue_share_pct", SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS "units_sold", SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit", (SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost")) * 100.0 / SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "gross_margin_pct" FROM "Sales" AS JOIN "Product" AS ON "Product"."ProductKey" = "Sales"."ProductKey" GROUP BY p."Category" ORDER BY "Sales Amount" DESC

questionText: List the top 10 products by revenue, showing product name, category, subcategory, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and margin percentage. Return columns: Product, Category, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending, limit to 10 rows.
questionLabel: [Q4][medium] List the top 10 products by revenue, showing product name, category, subcategory, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and margin percentage. Return columns: Product, Category, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending, limit to 10 rows.

payload.text: SELECT "Product", "Category", "Subcategory", SUM("Sales Amount") AS "revenue", SUM("Order Quantity") AS "units_sold", SUM("Sales Amount") - SUM("Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit", (SUM("Sales Amount") - SUM("Total Product Cost")) / SUM("Sales Amount") * 100 AS "margin_pct" FROM "Sales" JOIN "Product" ON "Sales"."ProductKey" = "Product"."ProductKey" GROUP BY "Product", "Category", "Subcategory" ORDER BY "Sales Amount" DESC LIMIT 10

Return columns: Subcategory, order_lines, revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.

payload.text: SELECT Subcategory."Postal Code" AS Subcategory, COUNT(*) AS order_lines, SUM(Sales."Sales Amount") AS revenue, SUM(Sales."Order Quantity") AS units_sold, SUM(Sales."Sales Amount") / SUM(Sales."Order Quantity") AS revenue_per_unit, AVG(Product."List Price") AS avg_list_price, SUM(Sales."Sales Amount") - SUM(Sales."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit, (SUM(Sales."Sales Amount") - SUM(Sales."Total Product Cost")) / SUM(Sales."Sales Amount") * 100 AS margin_pct FROM "Product" JOIN "Sales" ON "Product"."ProductKey" = "Sales"."ProductKey" JOIN "Sales_Order" ON "Sales"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "Sales_Order"."SalesOrderLineKey" JOIN "Sales_Territory" ON "Sales"."SalesTerritoryKey" = "Sales_Territory"."SalesTerritoryKey" JOIN "Customer" ON "Sales"."CustomerKey" = "Customer"."CustomerKey" JOIN "Reseller" ON "Sales"."ResellerKey" = "Reseller"."ResellerKey" JOIN "Date" ON "Sales"."OrderDateKey" = "Date"."DateKey" WHERE "Product"."Subcategory" = 'Poista' GROUP BY "Product"."Subcategory" ORDER BY revenue_descending."Postal Code" DESC

You are a SQL query generator for DuckDB.
Generate SQL queries that answer the user's questions using DuckDB SQL syntax.
Make sure you quote all field, column and table names.

Here is the database schema:

Available tables:

Table "Customer":
  Columns: CustomerKey (BIGINT), Customer ID (VARCHAR), Customer (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR)

Table "Date":
  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

Table "Product":
  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

Table "Reseller":
  Columns: ResellerKey (BIGINT), Business Type (VARCHAR), Reseller (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR), Reseller ID (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), ResellerKey (BIGINT), CustomerKey (BIGINT), ProductKey (BIGINT), OrderDateKey (BIGINT), DueDateKey (BIGINT), ShipDateKey (BIGINT), SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Order Quantity (BIGINT), Unit Price (DOUBLE), Extended Amount (DOUBLE), Product Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Total Product Cost (DOUBLE), Sales Amount (DOUBLE), Unit Price Discount Pct (BIGINT)

Table "Sales_Order":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), Sales Order (VARCHAR), Sales Order Line (VARCHAR), Channel (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales_Territory":
  Columns: SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Region (VARCHAR), Country (VARCHAR), Group (VARCHAR)

- Output a SQL SELECT query that answers the question.
- Do not output anything other than the SQL query

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"

You are a SQL query generator for DuckDB.
Generate SQL queries that answer the user's questions using DuckDB SQL syntax.
Make sure you quote all field, column and table names.

Here is the database schema:

Available tables:

Table "Customer":
  Columns: CustomerKey (BIGINT), Customer ID (VARCHAR), Customer (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR)

Table "Date":
  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

Table "Product":
  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

Table "Reseller":
  Columns: ResellerKey (BIGINT), Business Type (VARCHAR), Reseller (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR), Reseller ID (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), ResellerKey (BIGINT), CustomerKey (BIGINT), ProductKey (BIGINT), OrderDateKey (BIGINT), DueDateKey (BIGINT), ShipDateKey (BIGINT), SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Order Quantity (BIGINT), Unit Price (DOUBLE), Extended Amount (DOUBLE), Product Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Total Product Cost (DOUBLE), Sales Amount (DOUBLE), Unit Price Discount Pct (BIGINT)

Table "Sales_Order":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), Sales Order (VARCHAR), Sales Order Line (VARCHAR), Channel (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales_Territory":
  Columns: SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Region (VARCHAR), Country (VARCHAR), Group (VARCHAR)

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"

tablename ::= "\"Customer\"" | "\"Date\"" | "\"Product\"" | "\"Reseller\"" | "\"Sales\"" | "\"Sales_Order\"" | "\"Sales_Territory\""

"\"Order Quantity\"" | "\"Sales\"" "." "\"Unit Price\"" | "\"Sales\"" "." "\"Extended Amount\"" | "\"Sales\"" "." "\"Product Standard Cost\"" | "\"Sales\"" "." payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"

tablename ::= "\"Customer\"" | "\"Date\"" | "\"Product\"" | "\"Reseller\"" | "\"Sales\"" | "\"Sales_Order\"" | "\"Sales_Territory\""

columnref ::= "\"Customer\"" "." "\"CustomerKey\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"Customer ID\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"Customer\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"City\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"State-Province\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"Country-Region\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"Postal Code\"" | "\"Date\"" "." "\"DateKey\"" | "\"Date\"" "." "\"Date\"" | "\"Date\"" "." "\"Fiscal Year\"" | "\"Date\"" "." "\"Fiscal Quarter\"" | "\"Date\"" "." "\"Month\"" | "\"Date\"" "." "\"MonthKey\"" | "\"Date\"" "." "\"Full Date\"" | "\"Product\"" "." "\"ProductKey\"" | "\"Product\"" "." "\"Product\"" | "\"Product\"" "." "\"Standard Cost\"" | "\"Product\"" "." "\"Color\"" | "\"Product\"" "." "\"List Price\"" | "\"Product\"" "." "\"Model\"" | "\"Product\"" "." "\"Subcategory\"" | "\"Product\"" "." "\"Category\"" | "\"Product\"" "." "\"SKU\"" | "\"Reseller\"" "." "\"ResellerKey\"" | "\"Reseller\"" "." "\"Business Type\"" | "\"Reseller\"" "." "\"Reseller\"" | "\"Reseller\"" "." "\"City\"" | "\"Reseller\"" "." "\"State-Province\"" | "\"Reseller\"" "." "\"Country-Region\"" | "\"Reseller\"" "." "\"Postal Code\"" | "\"Reseller\"" "." "\"Reseller ID\"" | "\"Sales\"" "." "\"SalesOrderLineKey\"" | "\"Sales\"" "." "\"ResellerKey\"" | "\"Sales\"" "." "\"CustomerKey\"" | "\"Sales\"" "." "\"ProductKey\"" | "\"Sales\"" "." "\"OrderDateKey\"" | "\"Sales\"" "." "\"DueDateKey\"" | "\"Sales\"" "." "\"ShipDateKey\"" | "\"Sales\"" "." "\"SalesTerritoryKey\"" | "\"Sales\"" "." "\"Order Quantity\"" | "\"Sales\"" "." "\"Unit Price\"" | "\"Sales\"" "." "\"Extended Amount\"" | "\"Sales\"" "." "\"Product Standard Cost\"" | "\"Sales\"" "." "\"Total Product Cost\"" | "\"Sales\"" "." "\"Sales Amount\"" | "\"Sales\"" "." "\"Unit Price Discount Pct\"" | "\"Sales_Order\"" "." "\"SalesOrderLineKey\"" | "\"Sales_Order\"" "." "\"Sales Order\"" | "\"Sales_Order\"" "." "\"Sales Order Line\"" | "\"Sales_Order\"" "." "\"Channel\"" | "\"Sales_Territory\"" "." "\"SalesTerritoryKey\"" | "\"Sales_Territory\"" "." ("\"CustomerKey\"" | "\"Customer ID\"" | "\"Customer\"" | "\"City\"" | "\"State-Province\"" | "\"Country-Region\"" | "\"Postal Code\"" | "\"DateKey\"" | "\"Date\"" | "\"Fiscal Year\"" | "\"Fiscal Quarter\"" | "\"Month\"" | "\"MonthKey\"" | "\"Full Date\"" | "\"ProductKey\"" | "\"Product\"" | "\"Standard Cost\"" | "\"Color\"" | "\"List Price\"" | "\"Model\"" | "\"Subcategory\"" | "\"Category\"" | "\"SKU\"" | "\"ResellerKey\"" | "\"Business Type\"" | "\"Reseller\"" | "\"Reseller ID\"" | "\"SalesOrderLineKey\"" | "\"OrderDateKey\"" | "\"DueDateKey\"" | "\"ShipDateKey\"" | "\"SalesTerritoryKey\"" | "\"Order Quantity\"" | "\"Unit Price\"" | "\"Extended Amount\"" | "\"Product Standard Cost\"" | "\"Total Product Cost\"" | "\"Sales Amount\"" | "\"Unit Price Discount Pct\"" | "\"Sales Order\"" | "\"Sales Order Line\"" | "\"Channel\"" | "\"Region\"" | "\"Country\"" | "\"Group\"") | "\"CustomerKey\"" | "\"Customer ID\"" | "\"Customer\"" | "\"City\"" | "\"State-Province\"" | "\"Country-Region\"" | "\"Postal Code\"" | "\"DateKey\"" | "\"Date\"" | "\"Fiscal Year\"" | "\"Fiscal Quarter\"" | "\"Month\"" | "\"MonthKey\"" | "\"Full Date\"" | "\"ProductKey\"" | "\"Product\"" | "\"Standard Cost\"" | "\"Color\"" | "\"List Price\"" | "\"Model\"" | "\"Subcategory\"" | "\"Category\"" | "\"SKU\"" | "\"ResellerKey\"" | "\"Business Type\"" | "\"Reseller\"" | "\"Reseller ID\"" | "\"SalesOrderLineKey\"" | "\"OrderDateKey\"" | "\"DueDateKey\"" | "\"ShipDateKey\"" | "\"SalesTerritoryKey\"" | "\"Order Quantity\"" | "\"Unit Price\"" | "\"Extended Amount\"" | "\"Product Standard Cost\"" | "\"Total Product Cost\"" | "\"Sales Amount\"" | "\"Unit Price Discount Pct\"" | "\"Sales Order\"" | "\"Sales Order Line\"" | "\"Channel\"" | "\"Region\"" | "\"Country\"" | "\"Group\""

You are a SQL query generator for DuckDB.
Generate SQL queries that answer the user's questions using DuckDB SQL syntax.
Make sure you quote all field, column and table names.

Here is the database schema:

Available tables:

Table "Customer":
  Columns: CustomerKey (BIGINT), Customer ID (VARCHAR), Customer (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR)

Table "Date":
  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

Table "Product":
  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

Table "Reseller":
  Columns: ResellerKey (BIGINT), Business Type (VARCHAR), Reseller (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR), Reseller ID (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), ResellerKey (BIGINT), CustomerKey (BIGINT), ProductKey (BIGINT), OrderDateKey (BIGINT), DueDateKey (BIGINT), ShipDateKey (BIGINT), SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Order Quantity (BIGINT), Unit Price (DOUBLE), Extended Amount (DOUBLE), Product Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Total Product Cost (DOUBLE), Sales Amount (DOUBLE), Unit Price Discount Pct (BIGINT)

Table "Sales_Order":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), Sales Order (VARCHAR), Sales Order Line (VARCHAR), Channel (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales_Territory":
  Columns: SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Region (VARCHAR), Country (VARCHAR), Group (VARCHAR)

Table "Date":
  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

Table "Product":
  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

Table "Reseller":
  Columns: ResellerKey (BIGINT), Business Type (VARCHAR), Reseller (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR), Reseller ID (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales":

Table "Sales_Order":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), Sales Order (VARCHAR), Sales Order Line (VARCHAR), Channel (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales_Territory":
  Columns: SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Region (VARCHAR), Country (VARCHAR), Group (VARCHAR)

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"

payload.text: SELECT s."Channel", p."Category", SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "total_revenue", SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS "units_sold", SUM(s."Sales Amount") / SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS "revenue_per_unit", AVG(p."List Price") AS "avg_list_price", SUM(s."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS "realized_discount_pct", SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit", (SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost")) / SUM(s."Sales Amount") * 100 AS "margin_pct" FROM "Sales_Order" s JOIN "Sales" sa ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = sa."SalesOrderLineKey" JOIN "Product" p ON sa."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey" GROUP BY s."Channel", p."Category" ORDER BY s."Channel" ASC, "Total Product Cost" DESC

questionLabel: [Q25][hard] For each territory group and fiscal year, show the top sales channel by revenue, along with that channel's revenue, the total revenue for the group-year, and the channel's share of the group-year revenue. Return columns: Group, Fiscal Year, top_channel, channel_revenue, group_year_revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Group, then Fiscal Year ascending.

payload.text: SELECT st."Group", d."Fiscal Year", "Channel", SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "channel_revenue", SUM(s."Sales Amount") OVER (PARTITION BY st."Group", d."Fiscal Year") AS "group_year_revenue", ROUND(SUM(s."Sales Amount") OVER (PARTITION BY st."Group", d."Fiscal Year") * 100.0 / SUM(s."Sales Amount") OVER (PARTITION BY st."Group", d."Fiscal Year"), 2) AS "channel_revenue_share_pct" FROM "Sales_Territory" st JOIN "Date" d ON st."SalesTerritoryKey" = 1 JOIN "Sales" s ON st."SalesTerritoryKey" = s."SalesTerritoryKey" JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey" WHERE so."Channel" = (SELECTChannelNameFROMSalesOrderLineKeyWHEREChannelNameISMAXIMIZEDFORRevenueGROUPBYst."Group" + d."Fiscal Year") GROUP BY st."Group", d."Fiscal Year", "Channel" ORDER BY st."Group", d."Fiscal Year" ASC
